label: Train Attack to 40
detail: Equips steel weapons. Train at chickens → cows → barbarians.

label: Train Strength to 40
detail: Significant damage boost. Unlocks rune scimitar use with Str.

label: Train Defence to 40
detail: Unlocks rune armour. Notably reduces incoming damage at mid-tier bosses.

label: Train Attack to 60
detail: Equips dragon weapons. Significant accuracy jump.

label: Train Ranged to 40
detail: Equips green dragonhide. Useful for quests with magic-using enemies.

label: Train Magic to 55
detail: Unlocks High Alchemy. Core money-making and XP method.

label: Train Prayer to 43
detail: Unlocks Protect from Melee — one of the most impactful unlocks in the game.

label: Complete Recipe for Disaster (partial)
detail: Sub-quest completion grants access to Barrows gloves. Requires several pre-reqs.

label: Complete Monkey Madness I
detail: Grants access to best-in-slot melee training until late game (Maniacal Monkeys).

label: Complete Desert Treasure
detail: Unlocks Ancient Magicks spellbook. Required for many late-game routes.

label: Barrows runs (starter)
detail: Semi-consistent GP and gear. Entry-level bossing.

label: God Wars Dungeon access
detail: Requires 60 Strength to enter. High-tier drops including Godswords.

label: Chambers of Xeric (entry)
detail: Requires strong all-round stats. Most valuable loot table in the game.
